response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with a focus on testability and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, direct fintech infrastructure background, or proven production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments. His technical breadth and hands-on approach are strengths, but the role's executive and domain-specific requirements are not fully met.
strengths: Strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with modern and niche languages (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js).
Proven track record in building and maintaining event-driven, scalable platforms (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz).
Open-source contributions and technical evangelism (workshops, talks) demonstrate deep technical engagement and knowledge-sharing.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or track record scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks direct fintech infrastructure experience (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance).
No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes environments.
